summary: W1425 adds a source-level original-four-task completion witness surface and wires both audit declaration files to check it while explicitly preserving productSuccessClaimed = false. The immutable contract audit now reports no blockers, but the terminal outcome remains nonterminal.
known_gaps: Terminal outcome remains nonterminal and product_success is false, so update_goal is not allowed.
External final readonly audit is expected to fail until terminal_outcome.outcome is product_success.
remaining_work: Promote the audited original-four completion witness from a nonterminal witness surface to product-success evidence only after the Lean, packet, and terminal-outcome evidence all satisfy the immutable contract.
Rerun the clean extraction and external readonly audits after product_success is intentionally claimed.
